segments.text: He has founded his city on the holy mountain.
The Lord loves the gates of Zion more than all the other dwellings of Jacob.
Glorious things are said of you, city of God:
I will record Rahab and Babylon among those who acknowledge me— Philistia too, and Tyre, along with Cush— and will say, 'This one was born in Zion.'
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Indeed, of Zion it will be said,
This one and that one were born in her, and the Most High himself will establish her.
segments.speaker: The Most High

segments.text: The Lord will write in the register of the peoples:
This one was born in Zion.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: As they make music they will sing,
All my fountains are in you.
segments.speaker: Unidentified singers
